raw.message: Hunt For Treasure In Thrilling Storage Auctions And Be Strategic To Maximize Your Wins!

hook.summary: A storage unit auction begins with a bidding war over a mysterious covered object.
hook.visual_action: Garage door opens to reveal items; bidding UI pops up with character icons.
hook.voiceover_transcript: All right let's do this. Who's going to make it? Here. Now. Here.

scene_flow: Garage door opens to reveal a storage unit with a large covered object.
A fast-paced bidding war occurs between the player and two opponents.
The player wins the auction, and a shower of gold coins celebrates the victory.
The tarp is lifted to reveal a damaged, low-value truck, resulting in a 'FAIL!' message.
Final end card displays the game logo and a call to action.
audience_proxy: Men 25-45 who enjoy bidding games, storage auctions, and the thrill of risk-taking.
